title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Cancel
scenario: Tapping Cancel on Find My Device permission popup after denying Location Sharing during onboarding does not navigate back to Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. During onboarding, when the Location Sharing dialogue appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
7. Observe a permission popup with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
expected: The user is navigated back to the Poly Lens Menu screen.
